violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.

TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet in mens restroom noted in need of repair. Ceiling fan missing in mens restroom needs install. Metal ceiling vent cover in ladies restroom noted not in good repair rusting and non-cleanable.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): (Shared) exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling metal vent in women's restroom noted rusting. One ceiling light cover in front prep area needs cleaning.
